headline: 'The war scripted by Trump is being tested by an Iranian regime determined to survive at any cost'
description: The resilience shown by Tehran and the spread of conflict across the Middle East have prevented the US president from declaring victory as quickly and triumphantly as he had hoped, writes Le Monde columnist Gilles Paris.

headline: 'There is so much potential risk in the  Persian Gulf for environmental damage'
description: Doug Weir, director of the Conflict and Environment Observatory, outlines the risks facing populations and ecosystems as a result of the conflict involving Iran, Israel and the US.

headline: 'For sale, 5-year-old child, docile and calm': Yazidi genocide trial dives into horrors of IS
description: The Paris criminal court heard the harrowing reality of the enslavement of a people in the name of religion. Rarely has a terrorism trial gone so far in exposing the atrocities perpetrated by jihadists.

headline: Paris mayoral election: Three candidates head to second round following Knafo's withdrawal
description: Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire has refused any alliance with radical-left candidate Sophia Chikirou, as conservative candidate Rachida Dati looks to benefit from the withdrawal of two candidates.

headline: Rosalía launches her world tour in Lyon
description: The Spanish pop star kicked off her Lux World Tour on Monday at the LDLC Arena, on the outskirts of Lyon, in a whirlwind of style, language and religious imagery.

description: A study conducted in Yellowstone National Park in the United States finds that corvids return to the sites of previous feasts thanks to sophisticated strategies that had completely eluded researchers until now.

headline: French local elections: First-round results give sense of political landscape one year before presidential vote
description: With blurred lines between the right and far right, rivalry between the radical left and the Socialists and the fading of the presidential party, the period between the two rounds of the municipal vote is a testing ground for political power balances ahead of the 2027 election.

headline: Michelin Guide 2026: Michaël Arnoult, the only new three-star chef
description: The chef at Les Morainières earned a coveted third star in the latest edition of the Michelin Guide, which was unveiled in Monaco on Monday. It was a triumph for the reserved master chef.
